'''saroso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabella|tabella]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabella|tabella]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| saroso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:særeseth|særeseth]] || [[word:særesej|særesej]] || [[word:særesesh|særesesh]] || [[word:særese|særese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sarorosoth|sarorosoth]] || [[word:sarorosoj|sarorosoj]] || [[word:sarorososh|sarorososh]] || [[word:saroroso|saroroso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sarosoth|sarosoth]] || [[word:sarosoj|sarosoj]] || [[word:sarososh|sarososh]] || [[word:saroso|saroso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sarofsoth|sarofsoth]] || [[word:sarofsoj|sarofsoj]] || [[word:sarofsosh|sarofsosh]] || [[word:sarofsof|sarofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sarosotho|sarosotho]] || [[word:sarosojo|sarosojo]] || [[word:sarososho|sarososho]] || [[word:sarosoko|sarosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sarosoth|sarosoth]] || [[word:sarosoj|sarosoj]] || [[word:sarososh|sarososh]] || [[word:saroso|saroso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sarosothol|sarosothol]] || [[word:sarosojol|sarosojol]] || [[word:sarososhol|sarososhol]] || [[word:sarosokol|sarosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sarosothotho|sarosothotho]] || [[word:sarosojojo|sarosojojo]] || [[word:sarososhosho|sarososhosho]] || [[word:sarosoko|sarosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sarosothon|sarosothon]] || [[word:sarosojon|sarosojon]] || [[word:sarososhon|sarososhon]] || [[word:sarosokon|sarosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sarosothoro|sarosothoro]] || [[word:sarosojoro|sarosojoro]] || [[word:sarososhoro|sarososhoro]] || [[word:sarosokoro|sarosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
